comparison.colB3: Publish your availability, they see when you're free. Simple, no robots.
comparison.colB4: Build loyalty effortlessly — QR code, auto reminders, Google reviews.

comparison.philoText: Your clients see your availability, choose their service and book online. You get a notification, the deposit is secured, and the slot is blocked automatically.

faq.title: We answer
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: How long does it take to get started?
faq.a1: 5 minutes. Account, logo, loyalty reward. Your salon page is live, your QR code is ready. Enable the calendar and your clients can already book.
faq.q2: Will my clients find it complicated?
faq.a2: They scan the QR code with their camera, that's it. No app to download, no account to create. To book, they pick a slot on your page and confirm in 30 seconds.
faq.a3: Fixed-price services (nails, lashes, barber) → stamp mode. Variable amounts (hair, spa) → cashback mode. You can switch anytime.
faq.a4: You create your available time slots in the calendar, your clients book directly from your page. You get an instant notification, your client gets an SMS confirmation and a reminder the day before. You can also request a deposit automatically.
faq.q5: How do referrals and the welcome offer work?
faq.a5: Your clients share a link with friends. The new client gets a voucher, the referrer too. The welcome offer shows on your page to convert new visitors. Fully automatic.
faq.a6: Yes. You choose the gift (e.g. -20%, free treatment) and Qarte sends it automatically on each client's birthday. Zero effort on your part.
faq.q7: Does the price change after the 7-day trial?
faq.a7: No. $24/month or $240/year, same features during trial and after. No credit card to start.
faq.a8: 100% GDPR compliant, hosted in Europe, encrypted. We never resell anything. CSV export in 1 click if you leave.
faq.q9: Does it work for freelancers and home services?
faq.a9: Yes. Show the QR code on your phone, your client scans it, their visit is recorded. Your salon page replaces the website you never had time to build.
faq.q10: I'm already on Planity or Booksy — is it compatible?
faq.a10: Yes. You can keep your POS tool and use Qarte for loyalty, your storefront, referrals and Google reviews. Or switch entirely to Qarte with the built-in calendar — your choice.
faq.q11: How do deposits work for bookings?
faq.a11: You add your own payment link (Revolut, PayPal, Stripe...) in your calendar settings. When a client books online, they're asked to pay a deposit through your link. No Qarte commission — you receive payment directly to your account.
faq.a12: Your clients automatically receive an SMS confirmation when they book and a reminder the day before their appointment. 100 SMS per month are included in your plan, beyond that it's $0.06 per SMS.
faq.whatsappTitle: Have a question? Message us directly.
